ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the game (e.g., None, Special Edition) */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the game */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the game */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media format of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "release_region" TEXT /* Region the game was released in */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., Single-Player, Multi-Player, Co-op) */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Short description of the game */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* Cover art image of the game */,
  "links" TEXT /* Links to external resources (e.g., MobyGames, Wikipedia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_formats ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher (e.g., Rockstar, Ubisoft) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner (e.g., Sony, Microsoft) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_formats" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media format */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media format (e.g., Physical, Digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media format */,
  "media_size" TEXT /* Size of the media (e.g., 4K, 8K, Full HD) */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., Disk, Digital, Streaming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., PlayStation, Xbox) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., Console, PC, Mobile) */,
  "platform_version" TEXT /* Version of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "game_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-platform relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game on the platform */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the game on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platforms_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platforms_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Adventure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the genre (e.g., Action-Adventure, Role-Playing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "game_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-genre relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "genre_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the genre to the game (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_genres_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer (e.g., Company X, Studio Y) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "game_developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-developer relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "developer_role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the game development (e.g., Lead Developer, Co-Developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_developers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_developers_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., Metacritic, IGN) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., Critic, User) */,
  "rating_by" TEXT /* Person or organization that gave the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Person or organization that wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date the game was sold */,
  "sales_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of games sold */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the game was sold on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
